title: oxera gmelinoides
intro: Oxera gmelinoides is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, commonly known as the fragrant oxera or Gmelin's oxera. It is a shrub native to New Caledonia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant has been found to exhibit antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its health benefits. Oxera gmelinoides can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for various forms of consumption and potential health applications.
